title: evolvulus aurigenius var. macroblepharis
intro: Evolvulus aurigenius var. macroblepharis, also known as Dwarf Morning Glory or Beach Morning Glory, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus aurigenius var. macroblepharis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Evolvulus aurigenius var. macroblepharis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
